sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in source material

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Control - Helicopter
special_mechanics.description: Primary vehicle with machine guns, Hydra rockets, and Hellfire missiles. Limited ammunition capacity based on weapon tier. Armour depletion on enemy hit, fuel consumption, armour/fuel replenishment via power-ups and pickups.

physics_values.weapon_tiers: machine guns (unlimited) > Hydra rockets (moderate capacity) > Hellfire missiles (limited capacity)
physics_values.fuel_system: finite fuel depleted over level progression, replenished by fuel barrels
physics_values.armour_system: depleted on enemy fire, replenished by power-ups or rescued hostages

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Control - Motorbike
special_mechanics.description: Secondary commandeerable vehicle with different handling characteristics than helicopter.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Control - Hovercraft
special_mechanics.description: Secondary commandeerable vehicle with different handling characteristics than helicopter.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Control - F-117 Stealth Jet
special_mechanics.description: Advanced vehicle with variable height capability and unlimited ammunition, but increased vulnerability to crashes.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative gameplay documentation only. Wikipedia source provides game mechanic overview but no precise movement parameters, physics values, or sub-pixel system details. Game focuses on vehicle-based helicopter gameplay rather than character movement physics. No technical physics documentation available in provided sources.
